verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are people All over the world, To whom this message Must be told; All those honest in heart, In this light they have a part.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You've got to run, run, run, Run with the message of Malachi 4, You've got to tell it Like you've never told it before Let him that readeth run, Let him that heareth run, For this message is The coming of the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Always ready to give a reason, Be instant in and out of season Willing to take this blessed hope To a lost and dying world

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Seeing we have this ministry Let's not faint but earnestly Seek to build the Kingdom of God For the glory of the Lord
